Interface WorkspaceManager

public interface WorkspaceManager
Public API for the Workspace invalid input: '&' Project module. Backs the WORKSPACE_* websocket messages (GET, LIST_GET, CREATE, UPDATE, JOIN, LEAVE, MEMBER_LIST_GET).
